docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TAPIA, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT ROY, TASHIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-28-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROY, TASHIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM ALL PARTIES RETAINED. MIRNA ESCOBAR INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH, SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S.VANTREE NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAPIA, JANET IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROY, TASHIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
